# BP-85 positive variant: ServeHTTP makes the request boundary explicit.
lang: go
file: BP-85-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type requestHandler struct{}
type roleKey struct{}

func (requestHandler) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	role := r.Context().Value(roleKey{}).(string)
	_, _ = w, role
}
